briefdescription.para: Pads the beginning of a string with zeros until it reaches a specified length.

detaileddescription.para: Pads the beginning of a string with zeros until it reaches a specified length.This function prepends '0' characters to the input string str so that the resulting string has at least n_zero characters. If str is already equal to or longer than n_zero, it is returned unchanged.

str
The input string to pad.
n_zero
The minimum total length of the resulting string after padding.
A new string padded with leading zeros to reach the specified length.
("42", 5); // returns "00042" zfill("12345", 5); // returns "12345"
